pricing.title: Loops - Pricing
pricing.text:
Loops - Pricing
Pricing
Our pricing is based on subscribed contacts synced to Loops. Move the slider to estimate pricing. If you need a custom plan, please
send us an email
.
How many subscribers do you have?
100
1.5m+
1,000
Subscribers
Free
Per month
Early Stage Plan
The free plan is for early products and smaller audiences.
Get started
Up to 4,000 sends/month (enough for weekly emails)
All features included
Includes a small "Powered by Loops" footer
Need a custom solution? Contact us
→
Framer
Replicate
unDraw
perplexity
Modal
clerk
wabi
Spline
Linear
Reuters
Frequently Asked Questions
Wait, what's your price again?
Our pricing is based on subscribed contacts. Transactional email sending is included at no additional charge.
How is a subscriber defined?
A subscribed contact is an email address marked as subscribed. You can view all subscribed and unsubscribed contacts on your Audience page.
What does the free plan include?
The free plan includes up to 4,000 sends a month to 1,000 stored subscribed contacts. We do not charge for additional stored contacts. It also includes Loops branding at the bottom of your emails. Any paid plan will remove these limitations.
Do you charge for team seats?
No.
Do you charge for email sends?
No.
How are you different from other email platforms?
Sending email for your business is important and will have a material impact long term. You should take a look at all your options and go with what's best for your business.
Loops is free to start, with no credit card required and you can invite your entire team to help you make a decision. We believe we've built the best tool in our class. If you need to send email for your SaaS, we can confidently say Loops is likely the right choice.

analysis.name: Loops
analysis.value_proposition: The simplest way for SaaS companies to send product, marketing, and transactional email from a single platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Early-stage to growth-stage SaaS founders and developers who want a unified email platform without per-seat or per-send pricing complexity

features.name: email editor
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop email editor with cross-client compatibility guarantees

features.name: email templates
features.description: Reusable email templates accessible across the team

features.name: transactional email
features.description: API-triggered transactional email sending included in all plans at no extra charge

features.name: marketing email
features.description: Broadcast campaign emails sent to segments or lists

features.name: product email
features.description: Lifecycle product emails for onboarding, activation, and retention

features.name: loop builder
features.description: Visual canvas-based automation workflow builder for lifecycle email sequences

features.name: triggers
features.description: Event-based triggers to start email automation loops

features.name: branching
features.description: Conditional logic branches within automation loops

features.name: delays
features.description: Time-based delays between steps in automation loops

features.name: filters
features.description: Audience and property filters applied within loop steps

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Pre-built automation playbook templates for common lifecycle scenarios

features.name: contact management
features.description: Store, view, and manage email contacts with subscribed/unsubscribed status

features.name: contact properties
features.description: Custom key-value properties on contacts for segmentation and personalization

features.name: event tracking
features.description: Track user events from the app to trigger and filter emails

features.name: event properties
features.description: Custom properties attached to events for fine-grained filtering

features.name: segments
features.description: Dynamic audience segments built from contact properties and engagement

features.name: saved segments
features.description: Reusable saved segments shared across campaigns and loops, auto-synced with product data

features.name: mailing lists
features.description: Subscriber list management with opt-in/opt-out handling

features.name: subscriber preferences
features.description: Subscriber-facing preference center for managing list subscriptions

features.name: goal conversions
features.description: Track email-attributed conversion events like upgrades, activations, and referral clicks

features.name: split testing
features.description: A/B experiments on email content or subject lines

features.name: themes
features.description: Reusable design themes with global background, padding, border, and radius settings

features.name: reusable assets
features.description: Shared design assets reusable across emails

features.name: columns layout
features.description: Multi-column layout support in the email editor

features.name: code blocks in editor
features.description: Insert styled code blocks directly into email content

features.name: markdown support
features.description: Write email content using Markdown syntax

features.name: rest api
features.description: Full REST API for contacts, events, lists, and transactional sending

features.name: sdks
features.description: Official SDKs for JavaScript/TypeScript, Nuxt, PHP, Ruby; also Next.js and Laravel mentioned

features.name: cli
features.description: Command-line interface for managing Loops resources including contacts, events, lists, and transactional

features.name: agent skills
features.description: Support for AI agents to send email via Loops, with dedicated skill primitives

features.name: array support
features.description: Array data type support in contact/event properties

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outbound webhooks to notify external systems of email events

features.name: smtp
features.description: SMTP sending endpoint as an alternative to the API

features.name: double opt-in
features.description: Confirmation email flow requiring subscribers to verify their address

features.name: guardian
features.description: Deliverability protection system (launched Sep 2025, exact feature set not detailed in sources)

features.name: llm translation
features.description: AI-powered automatic translation of email content into other languages

features.name: language support
features.description: Multi-language email sending support

features.name: dns zone file generation
features.description: Auto-generate DNS zone file for sending domain setup

features.name: personal blocklist
features.description: Block specific email addresses from receiving any emails

features.name: cc/bcc
features.description: CC and BCC recipient support on transactional emails

features.name: account switcher
features.description: Switch between multiple Loops accounts from a single login

features.name: slack notifications
features.description: Receive Loops notifications inside Slack

features.name: zoom in loop builder
features.description: Zoom/pan controls on the loop builder canvas

features.name: transactional workflow
features.description: Dedicated workflow for triggering and managing transactional email templates

features.name: components
features.description: Reusable email content components shared across multiple emails

features.name: unlimited team seats
features.description: No per-seat charges; entire team can be invited at no additional cost

features.name: powered-by branding removal
features.description: Remove 'Powered by Loops' footer branding on any paid plan

features.name: soc2 compliance
features.description: SOC2 trust report available; DPA and DPF also provided

features.name: deliverability guides
features.description: Documentation and guides for improving inbox placement

features.name: sending domain setup
features.description: Custom sending domain configuration with DNS verification

differentiators: No per-seat pricing — entire team included at no extra cost
No per-send pricing — unlimited sends on paid plans
Transactional email included in all plans at no additional charge
All features included on every plan (including free)
Built specifically for SaaS companies, not general-purpose email
AI agent email support ('For agents') as a first-class use case
Cross-email-client compatible design system out of the box
Simple mental model: contacts, contact properties, events, event properties
